title: LTX-2.3 next-release â€” multi-stage preview, dual-latent staging, deferred capabilities
description: Follow-up to MPI-127 (LTX-2.3 shipped single-stage). This card carries everything deferred from the first LTX release: (1) DUAL-LATENT stage-2 staging â€” LTX saves Output_Video_Latent + Output_Audio_Latent and stage-2 loads BOTH (Input_Video_Latent + Input_Audio_Latent), but /comfy/stage-preview-latent + loadLatentName stage a SINGLE file; wiring this unlocks LTX preview->Continue/Finish (MPI-127 shipped stage-1 only). (2) UPDATED 2026-06-27 â€” SUPERSEDED BY R2: the LTX-2.3 weights are now self-hosted on Cloudflare R2 (bucket cubric-models, host https://models.cubric.studio/vision/ltx-2.3/<type>/), and the app + builder dep URLs already point there (MPI-137 migration done except GC; dependencies.js + install_models_ltx23.sh swapped). The original 'mirror to MPI HF / Mad-Pony-Interactive/cubric-studio' plan is OBSOLETE â€” R2 is the home of record now. What MAY remain here: confirm ALL 5 LTX base files (39GB transformer + 2 VAEs + text-projection + spatial-upscaler) are on R2 and reachable (they are, HEAD-200 verified), and that no remaining dep still points at HF/community mirrors for the BASE files. Coordinate with MPI-137 (bucket migration) + MPI-129 (HF->R2 dep migration) before touching any model URL â€” do NOT re-introduce HF self-hosting. (3) Kill the _ms key-suffix magic -> command.isMultiStage flag across commandExecutor. (4) Multimodal input UI (5+ images) when LTX upstream lands it â€” the {min,max} media-slot seam is already in place, max is a data bump. (5) Deferred LTX branches (separate workflows, own templates): lipdub v2v, lipsync-v2v-2, video extend, CTRL/pose, head-swap (BFS nodes). Distinct from MPI-4 (the LTX AUTHORING/research card) â€” this is the APP-integration follow-up.
